item.title: Music from the '90s Airwaves
item.description:
Natalie Imbruglia - Torn A handy dandy Spotify for this playlist - https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6Y5ZAYafXcESwM2r8v3x1a?si=45a4d7aad50f424c
Rusted Root - Send Me On My Way
TLC - What About Your Friends
4 Non Blondes - What's Up?
No Doubt (Gwen Stefani) - Just a Girl
Beastie Boys - Intergalactic https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qORYO0atB6g
Inner Circle - Bad Boys Originally released in 1987 to poor sales and zero airplay. Then it became engrained into pop culture when it was selected as the theme song to the '89 reality series "COPS" (one of the producers was unexpectedly a fan of the group) After this as well as the unexpected success of one of their later songs (Sweat - A La La La La Long), they re-released it in '93 as a single and it became a huge hit on the charts. Especially in Europe.
The Cranberries - Linger (making their US television debut on Conan)
Aaliyah - Are You That Somebody
The Offspring - Self Esteem
Alanis Morrissette - Hand in My Pocket
Barenaked Ladies - One Week
Brandy and Monica - The Boy is Mine
Vengaboys - We Like to Party
Scatman John - (Ski-ba-bop-ba-dop-bop)
Gloria Estefan - Turn the Beat Around
Shania Twain - Any Man of Mine A handy dandy Spotify playlist for this collection: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0xn43L2WypeZoWydTrv0Fr Wayback in 1973 - https://imgur.com/gallery/2rlT8Yh Wayback in 1983 - https://imgur.com/gallery/T1CGaYx Wayback in 1988 - https://imgur.com/gallery/qBqeSu1 Wayback in 1993 - https://imgur.com/gallery/tuAN3R4 Wayback in 1998 - https://imgur.com/gallery/2qki0gA
Whitney Houston - I Will Always Love You
Soul Asylum - Runaway Train
Created by "Pacific Data Images", and improved upon for the video... effects originally used only for motion pictures like WILLOW and TERMINATOR 2: JUDGMENT DAY EDIT: An article about the making of it - https://www.cartoonbrew.com/vfx/oral-history-morphing-michael-jacksons-black-white-144015.html
Lenny Kravitz - Are You Gonna Go My Way?
Seal - Kiss From a Rose
The Dixie Chicks - Wide Open Spaces
Aerosmith - I Don't Wanna Miss a Thing
Tag Team - Whoomp! (There It Is)
10,000 Maniacs - Candy Everybody Wants
Beastie Boys - Sabotage
2 Unlimited - No Limit
Céline Dion - My Heart Will Go On
Tupac - Changes Originally recorded in 1992, it was remixed and released posthumously after Shakur's murder in 1996
Sheryl Crow - Strong Enough
Outkast - Rosa Parks
Smashing Pumpkins - Tonight, Tonight
Aqua - Lollipop (Candyman)
Luniz - I Got 5 on It
Alanais Morissette - Thank U
Brandy - I Wanna Be Down
Martin Page - In the House of Stone & Light
Ol' Dirty Bastard (of the Wu-Tang Clan) - Shimmy Shimmy Ya
Tina Turner - GoldenEye
U2 - Hold Me, Thrill Me, Kiss Me, Kill Me
Del Amitri - Roll to Me
Hootie and the Blowfish - Hold My Hand
TLC - Creep
Shakira - Ciega, Sordomuda
Shania Twain - The Woman in Me (Needs the Man in You)
Dionne Farris - I Know
Bon Jovi - This Ain't a Love Song
Oasis - All Around the World
Vanessa Williams - Colors of the Wind
AC/DC - Hard as a Rock
Third Eye Blind - How's it Going to Be?
4 THE CAUSE - Stand By Me
The Pretenders - I'll Stand By You
Smashing Pumpkins - Ava Adore
Usher - My Way
Natalie Merchant - Carnival
Mariah Carey - Fantasy
Robbie Williams - Millennium
Whitney Houston and Mariah Carey - When You Believe https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LKaXY4IdZ40
Brandy - Baby
Adina Howard - Freak Like Me
Diana King - Shy Guy
INOJ - Time After Time
Destiny's Child - No, No, No
Aqua - Turn Back Time
Iron Maiden - Man on the Edge
Ricky Martin - La Copa de la Vida
Metallica - Whiskey in the Jar
LeAnn Rimes - Looking Through Your Eyes
The Outhere Brothers - Boom Boom Boom
Faith Hill - This Kiss
The Verve - Bitter Sweet Symphony
Weird Al Yankovic - Germs
The Rembrandts - I'll Be There For You (the Theme Song for F*R*I*E*N*D*S)
item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: Big Guy Dumps on Little Guy, Little Guy Explodes!
item.description: https://arstechnica.com/science/2024/05/if-you-can-see-the-big-dipper-youll-get-to-see-a-star-go-nova-soon/ A white dwarf star and a red giant star are locked in a binary dance. The red giant keeps offthrowing material, primarily hydrogen, which accumulates on the white dwarf until a massive fusion explosion, or nova, occurs. This happens about every eighty years They expect the next nova between now and September, and say that it should be visible with the naked eye. Neat!
item.dc:creator: fearlessfloyd

item.title: Nostalgia? In 1947, a Runaway 10-Year Old Went to 16 movies, Bought 15 Comic Books, 6 Games, 150 Candy Bars & Hot Dogs for $20 ... in 7 Days ...
item.description: $20 Dollars ... How long would that sustain you as a runaway now? 30-minutes?? https://sf.gazetteer.co/the-true-story-behind-the-kid-who-went-1940s-viral-for-his-week-at-the-cinemas-in-san-francisco
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin
